policy.completion_vocabulary: grammar/AST symbols, closed schema literals, and template-marker codec identities only

e803.reason: The treatment inferred component ownership from user-defined marker suffixes and namespaces.

changes: Output contract v4 invalidates every pre-canonical checkpoint and requires retraining.
Shared train/eval loading rejects records with explicit template semantic-role labels before artifacts exist.
Central lever validation rejects semantic marker roles, schema-role routing, namespace grouping, and disabled symbol anonymization.
External RuntimeSymbol markers reject semantic metadata.
Evaluation no longer fabricates semantic roles from marker suffixes.
TwoTower and grammar-diffusion context encoding, pseudo-embeddings, slot-component features, and deterministic template fill use ordinal marker identities.

decision: Invalidate E803 and all checkpoints or recipes that require semantic marker labels; retain only the opaque-marker harness policy.
